{# activity_tab.html — Vendor Activity tab: date-grouped manual note feed. Receives: vendor (VendorCard), activities (list[ActivityLog] newest-first), activities_truncated (bool). Called by: vendor_tab route (tab=="activity") in htmx_views.py. Depends on: HTMX, Alpine.js, Tailwind CSS, activity_row macro, now() Jinja global. #} {% from "htmx/partials/shared/_macros.html" import activity_row %}
{# ── Add note button ─────────────────────────────────────────── #}
{# ── Empty state ─────────────────────────────────────────────── #} {% if not activities %}

No activity recorded for this vendor yet.

Activity will appear here as you log notes and interactions.

{% endif %} {# ── Date-grouped activity feed ───────────────────────────────── #} {% if activities %}

Notes & Activity

{{ activities|length }}
{%- set today = now().date() -%} {%- set ns = namespace(day=None) -%} {% for a in activities %} {%- set ts = a.occurred_at or a.created_at -%} {% if ts and ts.date() != ns.day %} {%- set ns.day = ts.date() -%} {%- set day_delta = (today - ts.date()).days -%}

{%- if day_delta == 0 %}Today {%- elif day_delta == 1 %}Yesterday {%- else %}{{ ts.strftime('%b %d, %Y') }}{% endif -%}

{% endif %} {{ activity_row(a) }} {% endfor %}
{# ── Truncation footer ─────────────────────────────────────────── #} {% if activities_truncated %}

Showing most recent 50 activities — older history may not appear.

{% endif %} {% endif %}
